verses.1: My God, my God, why have you forsaken me?
verses.2: My God, I cry in the daytime, but you don’t answer;
verses.5: They cried to you, and were delivered.
verses.6: But I am a worm, and no man;
verses.7: All those who see me mock me.
verses.9: But you brought me out of the womb.
verses.10: I was thrown on you from my mother’s womb.
verses.11: Don’t be far from me, for trouble is near.
verses.13: They open their mouths wide against me,
verses.14: I am poured out like water.
verses.15: My strength is dried up like a potsherd.
verses.17: I can count all of my bones.
verses.18: They divide my garments among them.
verses.19: But don’t be far off, LORD.
verses.20: Deliver my soul from the sword,
verses.21: Save me from the lion’s mouth!
verses.22: I will declare your name to my brothers.
verses.23: You who fear the LORD, praise him!
verses.24: For he has not despised nor abhorred the affliction of the afflicted,
verses.25: My praise of you comes in the great assembly.
verses.26: The humble shall eat and be satisfied.
verses.27: All the ends of the earth shall remember and turn to the LORD.
verses.28: For the kingdom is the LORD’s.
verses.29: All the rich ones of the earth shall eat and worship.
verses.31: They shall come and shall declare his righteousness to a people that shall be born,
